core_arc: Child meets someone different and forms a friendship through shared activity.

personalisation_slots.NAME: Child's first name
personalisation_slots.NEW_FRIEND: Name of the new friend they meet
personalisation_slots.LOCATION: Where they meet — school, the park, the playground
personalisation_slots.INTEREST: Shared interest that brings them together
personalisation_slots.ACTIVITY: What they do together — derived from interest

scenes.outline: [NAME] was at [LOCATION]. [NAME] saw someone new. They were sitting alone.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] at [LOCATION], noticing a new child ([NEW_FRIEND]) sitting alone. Curious expression.

scenes.outline: [NAME] walked over. 'Hello,' said [NAME]. 'My name is [NAME]. What is your name?'
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] approaching [NEW_FRIEND], friendly wave or smile. Open body language.

scenes.outline: 'I am [NEW_FRIEND],' they said. 'I am new here.' [NAME] smiled. 'Do you want to play?'
scenes.illustration_brief: [NEW_FRIEND] looking up at [NAME], starting to smile. [NAME] gesturing invitingly.

scenes.outline: [NEW_FRIEND] nodded. 'Yes, please!' They went to [ACTIVITY] together.
scenes.illustration_brief: Both children standing together, ready to play. Happy expressions.

scenes.outline: They had so much fun. [NAME] and [NEW_FRIEND] laughed and played.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] and [NEW_FRIEND] engaged in [ACTIVITY], laughing, having fun.

scenes.outline: 'This is fun,' said [NEW_FRIEND]. 'I like [ACTIVITY].' 'Me too!' said [NAME].
scenes.illustration_brief: Both children smiling at each other, bonding moment. Shared enjoyment visible.

scenes.outline: It was time to go. 'Can we play again?' asked [NEW_FRIEND]. 'Yes!' said [NAME]. 'We are friends now.'
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] and [NEW_FRIEND] saying goodbye but looking happy. Perhaps a wave or handshake.

scenes.outline: [NAME] went home happy. [NAME] had made a new friend today. That was the best feeling.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] walking home with a big smile, thinking about their new friend.

comprehension_questions.inference: How do you think [NEW_FRIEND] felt when [NAME] asked them to play?
comprehension_questions.prediction: What do you think [NAME] and [NEW_FRIEND] will do next time they meet?

writing_worksheet.level_1_2: Trace and write: f, r, n, d. Copy the word: friend.
writing_worksheet.level_3_4: Write these words from the story: friend, played, happy. Write a sentence about making friends.
writing_worksheet.level_5_6: Write 2 sentences about [NAME] and [NEW_FRIEND]. What makes a good friend?

dinosaurs.ACTIVITY: dig for toy dinosaurs in the sand

space.flavour_detail: They flew to the moon together.

baking.flavour_detail: The mud pies looked like cakes.

nature.flavour_detail: The leaves were red and gold.

vehicles.flavour_detail: The cars raced around the track.
